themes.reasoning_notes: Turns each life-gain event into that many +1/+1 counters on the enchanted creature; built specifically to reward lifegain decks.
Its granted triggered ability repeatedly adds +1/+1 counters, making it a direct counters enabler tied to lifegain.
It is an Aura and fits Aura-centric shells, though its main deckbuilding pull is lifegain synergy rather than Aura density.
